issues.detail: Skill file lacks clear, actionable instructions for the agent.
Skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases for agent usage.
Skill file contains verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.
External curl command used without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Anchor counter program with PDA and authority check
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses #[derive(InitSpace)], seeds=[b"counter", authority.key().as_ref()], has_one = authority, and checked_add per the skill; baseline writes raw Solana account handling and misses Anchor's account macros.

scenarios.name: Create and mint an SPL token via CLI
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs spl-token create-token --decimals 6 then create-account/mint/transfer in the exact sequence from the skill; baseline reaches for Token Program web3.js calls and misses the spl-token CLI shortcut.
